# discord_channel (Data Source)

Fetches information about a Discord channel by ID.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The ID of the channel.

### Read-Only

- `bitrate` (Number) Bitrate of voice channels.
- `name` (String) Name of the channel.
- `nsfw` (Boolean) Whether the channel is NSFW.
- `parent_id` (String) ID of the parent category.
- `position` (Number) Channel position in the left-hand listing.
- `rate_limit_per_user` (Number) Per-user rate limit in seconds (0-21600).
- `server_id` (String) ID of the server (guild) the channel belongs to.
- `topic` (String) Channel topic.
- `type` (Number) Channel type (0 = GUILD_TEXT, 2 = GUILD_VOICE, etc.).
- `user_limit` (Number) User limit of voice channels (0 = unlimited).
